body.title: Retire uc_watchdog.py — it watches old utility_closet_server
body.result: replaced uc_watchdog with web_server_watchdog; uses WebServerDevice.start(); legacy env var honoured; 16 tests pass
body.description:
uc_watchdog.py in devices/igor/cognition/ watches utility_closet_server.py — the old ADC HTTP server that was replaced by devices/web_server/. The watchdog polls /api/health, relaunches the old server on failure, and keeps utility_closet.log. Now that web_server is the ADC, this file is either dead code or needs to be repointed to watch the web_server device.

**Affected files:** devices/igor/cognition/uc_watchdog.py
**Design rules:** none — this is cleanup
**Scope boundary:** Either delete uc_watchdog.py entirely (if nothing calls it) or update it to watch the web_server device health endpoint. Check callers first.
**Test plan:** Grep for uc_watchdog imports; verify no behavioral regression if deleted
